title: hieracium misaucinum subsp. pseudogaudinii
intro: Hieracium misaucinum subsp. pseudogaudinii, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a plant species in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium misaucinum subsp. pseudogaudinii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
